attack_narrative: 7-stage supply chain breach via VendorX credential compromise

attack_stages.stage_1: VendorX credentials compromised via phishing (06:00 UTC)
attack_stages.stage_2: Suspicious API gateway calls — session token abuse (08:00 UTC)
attack_stages.stage_3: SSH lateral movement to web-prod-01 (08:47 UTC)
attack_stages.stage_4: Container escape and privilege escalation (09:37 UTC)
attack_stages.stage_6: CARAG hunt loops executing — 3 iterations (10:55 UTC)
attack_stages.stage_7: Isolation applied — blast radius contained (10:08 UTC)
